contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: truesight.me impact-framing pass + Cacao Mass typo propagation
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/66
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/67
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/68
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/69
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/70
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/71
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/12
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/13
  
  Details:
  truesight.me impact-framing pass + Cacao Mass typo propagation
  
  After the earlier By Partner / By Inventory Type interactivity work, did a
  full impact-framing sweep so the public dashboard reads top-to-bottom as a
  mission narrative (cacao trees being financed) rather than retail-ops
  language. Operator-utility metrics preserved underneath, just no longer
  leading the read.
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#66 — Bust sell-through-report.json
     fetch cache. Adds { cache: 'no-store' } + timestamp query param so
     regenerated snapshots show up on reload instead of stale Fastly/browser
     cache. Symptom that surfaced this: Kiki's Cocoa kept showing 37
     chocolate bars after the underlying ledger had zeroed those SKUs out.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#67 — Reframe sales/inventory units as
     trees financed. Summary cards: 'Total Inventory'/'Monthly Sales' →
     'Trees in Inventory'/'Trees Financed / mo'. Column headers: 'Sold/mo' →
     'Trees/mo'. Inner detail labels: 'X sold/mo' → 'X trees/mo financed'.
     Convention: each SKU unit finances one cacao tree in the Amazon.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#68 — Sort By Partner rows by trees/mo
     financed descending so highest-impact partners surface first.
  
  4. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#69 — Rename the trailing-12mo
     $-denominated chart from 'Monthly Sales Volume' to 'Monthly Revenue
     Funding Trees' (section header, dataset legend, tooltip). Closes the
     last sales-ops-language seam.
  
  5. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#70 — Reframe inventory as Pipeline.
     Unsold units aren't trees yet — they're potential trees pending sale.
     'Trees in Inventory' → 'Trees in Pipeline' with value 'X awaiting
     sale'. 'Trees' column → 'Pipeline'. Plus the inner expanded tables
     (.type-detail + .partner-detail) got compact uppercase headers so the
     per-row repeats of 'trees/mo financed' / 'trees on hand' dropped to
     bare numeric cells — much less visually noisy.
  
  6. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#71 — Align the last two operator
     seams. 'Low Stock (<4w)' card → 'Partners Running Low (<4w)'. 'Weeks
     Stock' column → 'Weeks of Pipeline'. Same numbers, same threshold
     colors — just nouns that match the rest of the page.
  
  Plus inventory JSON refreshes triggered by Cacao Mass typo correction in
  the Currencies tab:
  
  7. TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory#12 — sell-through-report.json refresh
     to match the just-refreshed partners-inventory.json (Kiki's chocolate
     bars dropped from 37 to 0 across the board).
  
  8. TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory#13 — All four JSONs (partners-
     inventory, partners-velocity, sell-through-report, store-inventory)
     regenerated after Gary corrected 'Caca Mass' → 'Cacao Mass' on the
     Currencies tab. Verified grep across *.json: zero 'Caca Mass' left.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
